properties.name: Primary CTA
properties.description: The CTA that uses the positive button, to indicate a primary, positive action. This variant is reserved for use in the hero or other key call-to-action areas.

properties.name: Secondary CTA
properties.description: The CTA that uses the default button, used for most CTAs to indicate a positive action that isn’t necessarily the main one.

properties.name: Link CTA
properties.description: The CTA that uses the link, to embed actions or pathways to more information, allowing users to click their way from page to page.
